query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as com_complemento_no_endereco
FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND complement IS NULL
  AND (
    address LIKE '%- Shopping%' OR address LIKE '%- Galeria%' OR address LIKE '%- Loja%' 
    OR address LIKE '%- Sala%' OR address LIKE '%- Conj%' OR address LIKE '%- Edif%'
    OR address LIKE '%- Bloco%' OR address LIKE '%- Torre%' OR address LIKE '%- Piso%'
    OR address LIKE '%-Shopping%' OR address LIKE '%-Galeria%' OR address LIKE '%-Loja%'
    OR address LIKE '%- loja%' OR address LIKE '%- shopping%' OR address LIKE '%- conj%'
    OR address LIKE '%, Lj%' OR address LIKE '%, lj%' OR address LIKE '%- Lj%'
  );
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute 
SELECT COUNT(*) as com_complemento_no_endereco

  AND (
    address LIKE '%- Shopping%' OR address LIKE '%- Galeria%' OR address LIKE '%- Loja%' 
    OR address LIKE '%- Sala%' OR address LIKE '%- Conj%' OR address LIKE '%- Edif%'
    OR address LIKE '%- Bloco%' OR address LIKE '%- Torre%' OR address LIKE '%- Piso%'
    OR address LIKE '%-Shopping%' OR address LIKE '%-Galeria%' OR address LIKE '%-Loja%'
    OR address LIKE '%- loja%' OR address LIKE '%- shopping%' OR address LIKE '%- conj%'
    OR address LIKE '%, Lj%' OR address LIKE '%, lj%' OR address LIKE '%- Lj%'
  );
